summary: AtBat subscriber FGotD in market - Feed Select
description:
GIVEN a user is an Audio Only subscriber
AND a FGotD is scheduled/in-progress in the users viewing market
AND the game level blackedOutVideo equals true in MAST EPGv3
AND the game level entitledVideo equals false in MAST EPGv3

steps.action: WHEN a user selects the FGotD game tile
steps.result:
THEN video feed buttons are not displayed
AND the following blackout messaging is displayed in the Feed Select modal: “This game is unavailable in your area. All Regular Season and Postseason live games are subject to blackout restrictions due to Major League Baseball exclusivities. An archive copy of the game will be available 90 minutes after the game.”
